---
title: "Ömer Sümer"
subtitle: "Machine Learning & Computer Vision Researcher"
image: images/DSCF1760.JPG
about:
  template: marquee
  image-width: 35em
  image-shape: rectangle
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/osuemer
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/omer-sumer/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/sumeromer
    - text: Scholar
      icon: google
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=h5sbUygAAAAJ&hl=en
format:
  html:
    link-external-icon: false
    link-external-newwindow: true
    comments: false
---

<style>
table {
    border-top: hidden;
}
table, td, th, thead {
   border: none!important;
}
</style>


### <span style="color:#44A1A0;"> <u> recent news </u> </span> 

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="15%"}
**August 2023** 
:::
::: {.column width="80%"}
I presented our paper, *"Region-based Saliency Explanations on the Recognition of Facial Genetic Syndromes"*, at Machine Learning for Healthcare Conference (MLHC) at Columbia University.
:::
:::


:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="25%"}
![](publications/figures/Suemer-2023-MLHC.png)
:::
::: {.column width="2%"}
:::
::: {.column width="73%"}

</br>
<span style="color:#CD5C5C;"> **Region-based Saliency Explanations on the Recognition of Facial Genetic Syndromes** </span>  </br>
Ömer Sümer, Rebekah L. Waikel, Suzanna E. Ledgister Hanchard, Dat Duong, Peter Krawitz, Cristina Conati, Benjamin D. Solomon, Elisabeth André. </br>
Machine Learning for Healthcare Conference, 2023. 
[`Paper`](https://www.mlforhc.org/s/ID97_Research-Paper_2023.pdf)
[`Poster`](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1-g4-KXJv0Z_jAShyBFo1f5GF85I1acO3/view?usp=share_link)
[`Database`](https://zenodo.org/record/8209022) 
[`Code`](https://github.com/sumeromer/facial-gestalt-xai)
:::
:::
